# ConciergeBell

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ConciergeBell;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ConciergeBell { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
reception, bell, porter

## Categories
travel

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/concierge-bell)
